## Plugin Registry Checklist

- [ ] The plugin ID is stable and unique.
- [ ] The plugin ID matches `plugin.json` inside the archive.
- [ ] URLs use trusted HTTPS archive URLs (e.g., GitHub Releases).
- [ ] The SHA-256 hash matches the downloaded archive.
- [ ] The plugin does not include secrets, obfuscated code, hidden tracking, or unexpected network behavior.

## Notes

Describe what the plugin does and any permissions it requests.
